name: Emina 22" Marble Table Lamp - TBL2018 - Grey Marble - Safavieh
description: Product Ships in 2 Seperate Boxes. Introducing the Emina Table Lamp, an elegant addition to any room. With its sophisticated grey marble body, this lamp brings a touch of natural beauty and artistry to your space. The marble's inherent patterns provide a unique visual appeal, ensuring that no two lamps are exactly alike, offering a bespoke lighting experience. This lamp is paired with a fabric shade featuring a stylish pattern that creates a warm and inviting diffusion of light. Add a touch of natural elegance to your home with the Emina Table Lamp.
